title: Jeff Nogid
compiled_truth: Jeff Nogid is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-10 to 2001-11-01), Jeff Nogid sent 29 and received 152 emails, totalling 181 interactions.
